acCongrats.secondLine: You have passed all the test cases!
backgroundProblemView.empty: There are currently no background problems now. Now CPH-NG allows you to run test cases or a brute force compare in the background.
backgroundProblemView.title: Opened problems
createProblemView.createAlert: This document does not have a CPH-NG problem associated with it.
createProblemView.importAlert: This document has a CPH problem that you can import from, but no CPH-NG problem.
errorBoundary.description: An unexpected error occurred. We apologize for the inconvenience. You can try to reload the page or report this issue on GitHub.
errorBoundary.title: Error
main.narrowWidthAlert: Some features are hidden due to narrow width. Widen the panel to access all features.
noTestcases.firstLine: There is currently no test cases now.
noTestcases.secondLine: Add one using the button bellow!
oobe.step1.alert: Click the Next button at the bottom of this page to get started!
oobe.step1.content: CPH-NG (Competitive Programming Helper - Next Generation) is a VS Code extension that provides a complete environment for competitive programming.
oobe.step1.title: Welcome to CPH-NG!
oobe.step4.chrome.description: The extension is not yet available on the Chrome Web Store. Please download the .zip file from our GitHub Releases and install it manually.
oobe.step4.edge.description: CPH-NG Submit is available on the Microsoft Edge Add-ons store. You can install it directly from there.
oobe.step4.firefox.description: CPH-NG Submit is available on the Firefox Add-ons store. You can install it directly from there.
oobe.step4.subtitle: Browser extension integration allows CPH-NG to submit your source code to online judges with a single click.
oobe.step4.title: Browser Extensions
oobe.step5.docs.description: Read the official guide or ask AI for help
oobe.step5.joinQQ.description: Connect and chat with like-minded developers
oobe.step5.openSettings.description: Explore more features and customize your experience
oobe.step5.source.description: Check out the source code and give us a star!
oobe.step5.subtitle: You've completed the setup! Here are some recommended next steps to get you started.
oobe.step5.title: What's next?
